testsuite.name: com.factory.capturemasterpro.data.db.RecordingDaoTest

testcase.name: getRecordingById returns null for nonexistent id
insertRecording with REPLACE strategy updates on conflict
getAllRecordings returns recordings ordered by createdAt DESC
getAllRecordings emits empty list when no recordings
getTotalStorageUsed emits sum of file sizes
